# Shri Kuber Group (SKG)

> Shri Kuber Group is a vertically integrated real estate developer based in Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India. It develops the land, builds the structure in-house, and operates the hospitality within its developments — three disciplines under one accountable roof. Tagline: "The Power of Trust." Positioning: long-horizon and material-honest — "we build places that outlast the conversation about them."

## What SKG does (Develop · Build · Host)
- Develop: land acquisition and assembly, feasibility and underwriting, masterplanning and approvals.
- Build: in-house construction management, material and finish governance, delivery and handover.
- Host: hospitality operations, asset and estate management, guest and resident experience — SKG operates what it builds.

## Facts
- Headquarters: Shri Kuber House, 5th Floor, Nr. Pakwan Cross Road, S.G. Highway, Ahmedabad — 380051, Gujarat, India.
- Operates across Gujarat (Ahmedabad, Gandhinagar) and Rajasthan (Udaipur).
- Managing Director: Rahul Kuber.
- Scale (illustrative): 1.4M ft² under development, 6 active sites, ~18-year average hold, 100% of hospitality operated in-house.
- Sectors: Real Estate Development, Construction, Hospitality.

## Projects
- Kuber Riverfront — mixed-use riverfront quarter, Ahmedabad (under construction).
- The Kuber — 84-key house hotel, Ahmedabad, operated in-house by SKG (now open).
- Pakwan Heights — 210 residences in two towers, S.G. Highway, Ahmedabad (now leasing).
- Kuber Exchange — Grade-A workplace around a shaded court, GIFT City, Gandhinagar (in design).
- Saanjh Courtyards — low-rise courtyard housing, Gandhinagar (site acquisition).
- The Linen House — 36-key restored-haveli retreat, Udaipur (planning), operated in-house.
